channel.title: c++ on My Hugo
channel.description: Recent content in c++ on My Hugo

item.title: debug
item.description: Debugging with GDB: Top dbx StackTrace - trace callstack on Windows and gcc C++ Exceptions, Stack Trace and GDB Automation - Vlad Lazarenko Programmatic access to the call stack in C++ - Eli Bendersky's website breakpad/breakpad - Git at Google I want my pony! Or why you cannot have C++ exceptions with a stack trace docs - breakpad/breakpad - Git at Google Write yourself an strace in 70 lines of code - Made of Bugs Walking the callstack - CodeProject Catch2/Readme.

item.title: concurrency
item.description: concurrency GitHub - libuv/libuv: Cross-platform asynchronous I/O Double-Checked Locking Is Fixed In C++11 Joe Duffy - 15 Years of Concurrency GitHub - hnes/libaco: A blazing fast and lightweight C asymmetric coroutine library 💎 ⛅🚀⛅🌞 Portable Coroutine Library Home Page Coroutines in C

item.title: embed
item.description: embed How to debug the C++ with script side-by-side simultaneously | Cocos2d-x SWIG for developers in a hurry v8 Getting Started with Embedding · v8/v8 Wiki · GitHub How to build V8 on Windows and not go mad – DailyJS – Medium Update README file for Windows · Issue #272 · phpv8/v8js Building with GN · v8/v8 Wiki underscorediscovery/v8-tutorials: A set of introductory tutorials for v8 javascript engine Change is as good as a holiday?
